metadata.description: Practitioner-built Claude skills by Adrian Ionescu. First up: AI Portfolio Manager — run a whole portfolio of projects across multiple AI models with a persistent tracker and weekly sprints.

plugins.name: ai-portfolio-manager
plugins.description: The SprintFleet Method: manage a portfolio of projects with AI — persistent master tracker + weekly sprint plans routing tasks across AI models and subscriptions, with usage-budget management, check-ins, remediation, and sprint-end reports.
